calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Candace Bedsole in Propria Persona.

Ms. Bedsole reported that all of the bank accounts had been distributed to the named Beneficiaries and closed. The Amended Petition for Probate filed March 23, 2009 and the Petition for Probate filed March 3, 2009 were taken off calendar.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Ann Mendoza CSR#6812. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-11-2009 Continued To Feb-25-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Witser for Charles Gibbs Jr. Deana Becerra in propria persona.

Ms. Becerra stated that she had not filed a petition but she had submitted the will to the Court. In addition, she stated that she had consulted with five attorneys and that all stated that this didn't need to be probated. Mr. Witser stated that he had not seen any accounts, that the decedent died in September, that it had been five months, and that he could not dispute or confirm anything. Ms. Becerra replied to counsel's comments, and stated that her Mother was now receiving the bank statements and she could have presented them to Mr. Witser. The Court informed Ms. Becerra that it was her obligation to present the will to the Court and to file her petition to probate. Ms. Becerra stated that she would be filing a petition. The matter was continued to February 25, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the filing of the petition by Ms. Becerra. The Court stated that if the petition was not on file by that date the parties would need to appear.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Sandberg.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Continued To Feb-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deana Marie Becerra in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Becerra stated that she was objecting to the petition and that she would be submitting the will. The matter was continued to February 11, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court directed Ms. Becerra to have her written objection on file by Febraury 9, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Continued To Jan-27-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
